title: Exact comparison count of selection sort
statement_informal: Selection sort always performs exactly n(n-1)/2 key comparisons on a list of length n, independent of the data.

cost_model.notes: Each y <? x test in select counts as one; the count is an exact equality, not just a bound.

references: Knuth, TAOCP Vol. 3 (selection sort comparison count) — fact only, no prose copied
